recommendedGate.name: Agent Main Population Gate
recommendedGate.reason: FSC/SSC main-population gates are usually non-rectangular; polygon is the default unless the user explicitly requests another shape.
geometryInstructions: Use the preview.points or preview.bins returned by get_plot_context to choose vertices.
Do not read the FCS file directly or create local plots for gate geometry.
Fill gateTemplate.vertices with at least three [x, y] pairs, then call nextAction.tool.

checks.name: gate_exists
checks.message: Gate is present for the requested sample.

checks.name: stats_ref_matches
checks.message: Stats evidence ref matches this workspace revision.

checks.name: x_axis_exists
checks.message: Gate x axis exists in sample metadata.

checks.name: y_axis_exists
checks.message: Gate y axis exists in sample metadata.

checks.name: non_empty_preview
checks.message: Stats were computed from a non-empty preview sample.

checks.name: min_population_percent
checks.message: Population percent is above the configured minimum.

checks.name: max_population_percent
checks.message: Population percent is below the configured maximum.

report_schema.author: agent
report_schema.note: The report body must be authored by the agent; Flowcyto only validates and persists it.

report.title: Edited main population QC
report.summary: Existing FSC/SSC gate was revision-safely edited and validated with deterministic FlowCyto evidence.

storedReport.title: Edited main population QC
storedReport.summary: Existing FSC/SSC gate was revision-safely edited and validated with deterministic FlowCyto evidence.
